# ☕ Java First Steps

<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-new-f89820?style=for-the-badge&logo=java&logoColor=white" />

This repo tracks my journey learning Java from the very beginning.

---

## Purpose

This is a **progress-based repository** showing how my skills improve over time, not just finished projects.

---

## Structure

Code is organized by **months**, so you can clearly see how I improve as time goes on.

---

## AI-Generated Files

Some early files in this repository are **AI-generated or AI-assisted**.

These files are clearly marked at the top of each file so it is always obvious when AI was used.

They are included for:

Learning how code works  
Understanding structure and logic  
Helping me transition into writing my own versions later  

---

## Usage

You are free to **view, use, and learn from any code in this repository**.

This project is meant to help both myself and others understand Java, so feel free to take ideas or adapt code for your own learning.

---

## Notes

Early code includes **AI-generated comments** to help me understand what’s happening.  
Over time, I’ll rely less on that and write my own explanations.  
This repo is about **learning and growth**, not perfection.

---

## Goal

Build a strong foundation in Java and move into plugin/backend development.

</div>
